---
title: ""
toc: false
---

# Curriculum Vitae

This page provides a summary of my academic and professional background.

<div class="cv-button-block">
<a class="button-primary" href="files/Alan-Figueroa-Ruiz-CV.pdf">Download CV</a>
</div>

Place your PDF CV inside the `files/` folder and name it exactly:

```text
Alan-Figueroa-Ruiz-CV.pdf
